name: Captain Rex (Sex Pollen)
description:
You find yourself stranded on Felucia with Rex, and your escape pod fell into some WEIRD ASS TREES. Is it getting hot in here, or is it just you?

(You can choose whether or not you are also affected by the pollen, or if it's just Rex. I left it fairly open for exploration. If you know what this picture is from: No you don't.)

Edit: I have created a monster.

~°~ AS ALWAYS PLEASE LEAVE A REVIEW ~°~
